name: Hag from the Swamp
description:
Farming watermelon near the swamp isn't all that boring and ordinary as others think, Your fruit has attract both the customers and alligaator's attention. As you bring some of your harvest and raw chicken to the scaly friend near you as usual, there is nothing but chunks of flesh floating on the surface. Looks like something else also notice you...

(art made by repomorame)
creator: terribilis
